title: SAFE PARKING - 211info
text: MOUNTAIN VIEW COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT SAFE PARKING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides safe parking facilities for community members living out of their car or a RV, and also has shower and laundry facilities. Partners with two local low-income housing complexes to provide case management support for placement into permanent housing. 1475 SW 35th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Permanent housing: age 55 and older or families with children Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 527-0028 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 527-0028 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Jefferson, and Crook Counties Services: Family Permanent Supportive Housing Homeless Safe Parking Programs Laundry Facilities Older Adult/Disability Related Supportive Housing Public Showers/Baths If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOUNTAIN VIEW COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT
